demo.banner: Demo mode — no real SMS or payments will be sent

safety.title: Safety-first
safety.body: Hard-coded red flags override every agent. A tow is dispatched the instant a critical signal appears.

explainable.title: Explainable
explainable.body: Every recommendation carries a plain-language rationale you can read, audit, and override.

transparent.title: Transparent
transparent.body: You see what the system sees: sensor state, wellbeing score, and the dispatch trade-offs — always.

quickLinks.title: What can we do for you today?

book.title: Book a service
book.body: Four short steps with an autonomous concierge at the end.

voice.title: Talk to us
voice.body: Describe the problem with your voice. We listen, you confirm.

photo.title: Show us
photo.body: Upload a dashcam or instrument cluster photo for instant analysis.

noise.title: Record a noise
noise.body: Engine, brakes, or drivetrain — we classify the sound.

help.title: Help centre
help.body: Ten plain-language articles, searchable on the page.

book.title: Book a service visit
book.subtitle: Four short steps. We confirm only what we can honour.

progress.label: Progress
progress.failed: Something failed — see the error below

errors.otpRequired: Enter the code we just sent you
errors.vehicleRequired: Add a VIN so we can identify the car
errors.decodeFailed: We could not decode this VIN. Check the characters.
errors.canDriveRequired: Tell us whether the vehicle is safe to drive
errors.symptomsRequired: Describe the symptoms in a few words

step1.title: Sign in with your phone
step1.headline: Sign in.
step1.subtitle: We will text a one-time code to your phone.
step1.phoneHint: E.164 format. We never share your number.

step2.title: Identify your vehicle
step2.headline: Tell us about the vehicle.
step2.subtitle: We use the VIN to decode the rest.
step2.vinHint: Seventeen characters, no I, O, or Q.
step2.manual: I do not have a VIN — enter manually
step2.connectedCar: Or pull from your connected car

step3.title: What is happening?
step3.headline: What is happening?
step3.subtitle: Tell us as little or as much as you like. We will ask back if we need more.
step3.symptomsPlaceholder: The car makes a low grinding sound when I press the brake at low speeds.
step3.canDriveLabel: Can you drive the vehicle safely right now?
step3.redFlagsLabel: Any of these happening right now?

step4.title: Review
step4.headline: We agree on this plan.
step4.subtitle: Confirm and we will dispatch.
step4.authorise: By confirming you authorise us to dispatch on your behalf. You can revoke at any time.

action.green: Drive in for a routine check. We can hold a slot tomorrow.
action.amber: Drive with care. We have a service centre that can take you today.
action.red: Do not drive. We will arrange a tow and a loaner.

step4.priceBandHint: Honest range. Final figure on the invoice.

step5.headline: Hand it over.
step5.subtitle: Your concierge is on it.
step5.fallbackMessage: I want to book a service visit.

redFlags.fluid-puddle-large: Large fluid puddle under the car
redFlags.driver-reports-unsafe: I feel the vehicle is unsafe

voice.title: Tell us what is happening
voice.subtitle: Press the button, describe the problem, then confirm or edit the transcript.
voice.transcriptPlaceholder: Your transcript will appear here. You can edit it before submitting.

tips.environment: Roll the windows up if the engine is running.
tips.bargein: Speak again to interrupt our reply.
tips.edit: You can correct the transcript before sending.

photo.title: Show us the dashboard or the damage
photo.subtitle: Capture from your camera or upload a saved image. EXIF metadata is stripped on your device.

options.title: Options
options.privacy: We strip EXIF metadata in your browser before upload, blur faces and license plates on your device, compress under 1 MiB, and never store the raw camera frame.

redaction.summary: On-device redaction: {faces} face(s), {plates} plate(s) blurred in {ms} ms.

state.analysingBody: We compare against known patterns and reply with what we see.
state.redactingBody: Faces and license plates are blurred before the photo leaves your phone.
state.redactionRequired: On-device redaction must finish before upload.

noise.title: Record an engine, brake, or drivetrain noise
noise.subtitle: We compute a mel-spectrogram on your device and classify it on the server.

options.title: Options
options.label: What kind of noise
options.tip: Hold the microphone close to the source and avoid wind.

state.classifyingBody: We compare against a labelled reference library.

status.title: Booking {id}
status.waiting: Technician Ravi is finishing a brake reseal. 22 minutes to you.
status.override: Switch to a nearby center instead
status.mapAlt: Topographic preview of the route to the service centre
status.conciergeHint: The agent trace and any technician notes will appear here as the booking progresses.
status.conciergeEmpty: No events yet. The next update will land here.

abort.title: Switch to a tow?
abort.body: We will end the on-route handover, call you a tow, and refund the unused portion of your authorisation. The vehicle will not move until you confirm again.
abort.toastBody: We are calling a tow now. We will text you when it accepts.

accepted.label: Booking accepted
accepted.body: We confirmed your slot at the service centre.

assigned.label: Driver assigned
assigned.body: Ravi will pick the car up from your location.

pickup.label: Driving to your location
pickup.body: The driver is on the way to collect the vehicle.

drivingToCentre.label: Driving to service centre
drivingToCentre.body: The car is on the road. Wellbeing is being monitored every five seconds.

atBay.label: In the service bay
atBay.body: Front brake pads inspected. Replacement confirmed within the quoted range.

ready.label: Ready for handover
ready.body: Service complete. The driver is bringing the vehicle back to you.

autonomy.title: Vehicle {id}
autonomy.subtitle: Sensors, PHM, and command-grant state at a glance.

revoked.title: Grant revoked
revoked.body: The vehicle returns to manual control on the next heartbeat.

consent.title: Your consents.
consent.subtitle: What you have allowed us to do, and how to take it back.
consent.kpiDescription: We do not bundle. Each purpose stands alone.
consent.consequenceBody: This purpose is required to honour your active booking. Revoking will cancel the booking and trigger a refund of any pending authorisation.
consent.footerTitle: Take it with you. Or take it back.
consent.exportToastTitle: Your data export is on the way
consent.exportToastBody: We are preparing a JSON archive. We will email a download link in the next few minutes.
consent.exportFailed: Export request failed. Try again in a moment.
consent.deleteBody: This removes your records from the live database, queues a removal across backups, logs, caches, and analytics, and emails you a deletion certificate within thirty days. Some transaction logs are kept under statutory retention rules; we will list which.
consent.deleteToastBody: Your erasure request has been recorded. You will receive a certificate by email when the chain completes.
consent.deleteFailed: Deletion request failed. Try again in a moment.
consent.staleBanner: {count} of your consents are on an older notice version. Please review and re-confirm.

legalBasis.marketing: DPDP Act 2023 §S(A) consent (opt-in only); GDPR Art. 6(1)(a)
legalBasis.ml-improvement-anonymised: DPDP Act 2023 §S(A) consent; GDPR Art. 6(1)(a) on de-identified data
legalBasis.autopay-within-cap: DPDP Act 2023 §S(A) consent; RBI auto-debit guidelines

noticeBody.service-fulfilment: We use your phone, vehicle, and symptom inputs to deliver the booking you requested. Without this purpose, we cannot operate the booking. Retention: as long as you have an open booking plus seven years of statutory log retention.
noticeBody.diagnostic-telemetry: We pull connected-car telemetry (state of charge, brake-pad wear, error codes) to refine our diagnosis. You can revoke any time. Retention: ninety days of raw telemetry, then aggregated only.
noticeBody.voice-photo-processing: We process voice transcripts and dashcam photos to improve diagnosis. Faces and plates are redacted on your device before upload. Retention: ninety days for the transcript, immediate on the redacted-original frame.
noticeBody.marketing: We will send you product news and reminders. Marketing defaults to off; we never bundle it with operations.
noticeBody.ml-improvement-anonymised: We use anonymised data to improve our models. Re-identification is contractually and technically forbidden.
noticeBody.autonomy-delegation: We sign a time-limited capability that lets the OEM autonomously drive your car within a named geofence. Every grant is revocable from the dashboard.
noticeBody.autopay-within-cap: We capture authorised payments up to the cap you set. Any amount above the cap requires a one-tap approval.

service-fulfilment.name: Process data to fulfil the service booking
service-fulfilment.body: Your name, contact, vehicle, and booking details. Used only to honour the service you have requested.

diagnostic-telemetry.name: Ingest diagnostic telemetry from the vehicle
diagnostic-telemetry.body: Sensor and OBD-II data from your car. Lets us predict faults before they strand you.

voice-photo-processing.name: Process voice and photo uploads for diagnosis
voice-photo-processing.body: Voice notes and photos you choose to share. Redacted on-device before upload.

marketing.name: Marketing messages about new services
marketing.body: Optional. We will tell you about new service options. You can switch this off any time.

ml-improvement-anonymised.name: Use anonymised data to improve our models
ml-improvement-anonymised.body: Optional. Your data, stripped of identifiers, helps every owner who comes after you.

autonomy-delegation.name: Delegate autonomous handoff within my cap
autonomy-delegation.body: Allows the car to drive itself to the service centre and back, only inside the geofence and time window you set.

autopay-within-cap.name: Auto-pay within the cap I set
autopay-within-cap.body: Pays the service centre on your behalf, never beyond your stated limit.

snippet.getting-started: What VSBS does, what it does not, and the three ground rules.
snippet.booking-a-service: Four short steps and a final autonomous turn.
snippet.voice-intake: Press to talk. We never store raw audio.
snippet.photo-upload: Dashcam, cluster, exterior, underbody. EXIF stripped on device.
snippet.autonomy-handoff: When the OEM supports it, the car drives itself in.
snippet.command-grants: What a signed grant carries and how to revoke it.
snippet.payments: Razorpay-backed. Auto-pay opts in only when you ask.
snippet.refunds: When refunds fire automatically and how to request one.
snippet.deletion-and-erasure: Real deletion across backups, logs, caches, analytics.
snippet.contact-support: How to reach a human, and when to call emergency instead.

search.label: Search the help centre
search.hint: Press "/" to focus. Results update as you type.
search.noResultsBody: We did not find anything for ‘{query}’. Try a different word, or browse the article index.

feedback.label: Was this helpful?
feedback.thanksBody: We use this to decide which articles to rewrite next.
feedback.sorryBody: Open the contact-support article and we will help you directly.

offline.title: We have you covered offline.
offline.subtitle: Your booking continues. We will reconnect when your network does.
offline.body: Your phone says the network is unreachable. Cached pages still work and any changes you make will sync when you are back online.

points.cached: Cached: home, booking, and status pages are still readable.
points.queued: Queued: pending writes will replay automatically.
points.safety: Always available: safety pages and the consent dashboard.

safety.towRequired: We will not let you drive this vehicle. A tow is on the way.
safety.takeoverRequired: Please take control in the next 5 seconds.

error.body: We could not complete that request.

region.title: Where your data lives
region.subtitle: Your bookings, telemetry, and consent records are pinned to one regional data plane. We never copy them across borders.
region.switchOk: You have no pending bookings, so you can switch.
region.switchBlockedHint: You have {count} pending booking(s). Finish or cancel them before switching region.
region.residencyBody: India users stay on asia-south1 to meet DPDP residency rules. US users stay on us-central1. Switching means a fresh start in the other plane — your records do not migrate.

errors.switchBlocked: We cannot switch region while a booking is in progress.

reason.explicit-header: You set this region with an explicit override.
reason.cookie: We remembered your last choice from a cookie.
reason.geo: We detected this from your network location.
reason.fallback: We are using the default region for this server.

demoCarla.title: Autonomous service loop, end to end
demoCarla.subtitle: Failure detected. Booking opened. Vehicle drives itself to the service centre, gets serviced, comes home — all under signed grants.

concierge.title: Autonomous concierge
concierge.subtitle: The supervisor is running your safety, wellbeing, and dispatch checks. Every tool call is verified before it runs.
concierge.advisoryBody: We will not certify safety from a description alone. We can arrange a tow so a qualified mechanic can inspect the car in person.

rows.toolCallBody: Supervisor is requesting a validated tool invocation.
